nasb.text: ‘Now if anyone of the common people sins unintentionally in doing any of the things which the Lord has commanded not to be done, and becomes guilty,

esv.text: “If anyone of the common people sins unintentionally in doing any one of the things that by the Lord’s commandments ought not to be done, and realizes his guilt,

cnv.text: “如果那地的居民中有人無意犯了罪，行了一件耶和華吩咐不可行的事，他就有罪。

ccb.text: “平民若无意中触犯耶和华的诫命，也是犯罪。
